title: lepidium huberi
intro: Lepidium huberi, also known as the Chilean cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, Brassicaceae. It is native to the Andean region of Chile and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lepidium huberi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Lepidium huberi is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in culinary dishes for its peppery flavor.
